stemHtml: Select the option that best describes a fail-safe designed structure.

options.a: Multiple load paths through a structure that is replaced after limited usage.
options.b: One load path is sufficient and the structural element is removed at the end of its lifetime or number of cycles.
options.c: A structure that has built-in redundancy with multiple load paths.
options.d: A single load path in a structure that can withstand 1.5 times the maximum design load.
